title: Bitwise CRCL Option Income Strategy ETF declares $1.676 dividend
content:
* Bitwise CRCL Option Income Strategy ETF (ICRC [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/ICRC]) declares $1.676/share monthly dividend [https://seekingalpha.com/pr/20373966-bitwise-announces-monthly-distributions-for-imst-icoi-imra-igme-icrc-and-ieth].
 	* Forward yield [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/ICRC/dividends/yield?source=news_bullet] 78.84%
